info.name: Currency Cordoba
info.description: Nicaraguan Cordoba (NIO) exchange rates relative to USD (base currency)

buyRate.description: Exchange rate to buy NIO with USD. Example: 36.821 means 1 USD = 36.821 NIO

sellRate.description: Exchange rate to sell NIO for USD. Example: 36.80 means 1 USD = 36.80 NIO
